title: E-012 malformed path.json passes structurally; sibling preserved, no crash
description: Synthesized /tmp/forge_e012/paths/{01-orderbook-viewer, 99-broken/path.json='{ not-json'} and invoked scanRegistry. Result: paths = ['01-orderbook-viewer'] (well-formed sibling preserved); warnings = exactly one entry with kind='malformed-path-json' whose .path field references the broken slug ('/tmp/forge_e012/paths/99-broken/path.json'). No exception thrown. Scenario E-012 covers AC-3.2 and continues to pass on the discriminator contract that consumers actually branch on. Verified registry.test.ts T-021/T-022 (28/28 green).
impact: None. E-012 acceptance criterion AC-3.2 is met at the structural level the harness asserts.
recommendation: No action. Round-1 already filed the literal-wording divergence (warning says 'Failed to parse <abs path>: <detail>' rather than scenario prose 'skipped paths/99-broken/path.json: parse error') as low; cycle 6 did not scope it and it remains below remediation threshold.
evidence:
kind: 'malformed-path-json',
        message: `Failed to parse ${pathJsonFile}: ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`,
        path: pathJsonFile,

title: E-013 empty paths/ dir passes structurally; warning emitted, no crash
description: Synthesized empty /tmp/forge_e013/paths/ and invoked scanRegistry. Result: paths = []; warnings = exactly one entry with kind='empty-paths-dir', message='Paths directory exists but contains no path subdirectories: /tmp/forge_e013/paths'. No exception thrown, no path-selection prompt would be rendered (start.ts paths array is empty). Scenario E-013 covers AC-3.3 and continues to pass on the discriminator contract. Verified registry.test.ts T-024 (green).
impact: None. E-013 acceptance criterion AC-3.3 is met at the structural level the harness asserts.
recommendation: No action. Round-1 already filed the literal-wording divergence (warning lacks the literal 'no paths installed' phrase from the scenario prose) as low; cycle 6 did not scope it and it remains below remediation threshold.
evidence:
kind: 'empty-paths-dir',
          message: `Paths directory exists but contains no path subdirectories: ${scanRoot}`,

title: Cycle-6 path-traversal containment intact for hint reads (no regression)
description: Cross-checked the path-traversal containment claim from cycle 5 round 2 against cycle 6's new content packs (paths/01-orderbook-viewer/rungs/{p2-spot-1,p3-spot-1}/*, phases/{p2,p3}.md). requestHint resolves the rung markdown payload via `containedPath(slugContentRoot, rungRelPath)` where slugContentRoot = projectRoot/paths/<slug>, for all three rung kinds (hint_md / reference_md / auto_write_md), with an explicit PathTraversalError → auto-write-failed branch. Cycle 6 did NOT join paths raw; it preserved the C012 fix. Verified requestHint.test.ts (55/55 green).
impact: None — security posture is preserved across cycle 6. No critical regression to flag.
